report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides: On-Chain Analytics Guide 2026 covering Glassnode, Nansen, Dune, Artemis, DefiLlama, smart money tracking, and dashboard building; and Crypto Arbitrage Strategies Guide 2026 covering CEX/DEX arb, cross-chain arb, funding rate arb, tools, and risk management.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: On-chain analytics is a top 2026 narrative: Glassnode, Nansen, Dune Analytics, Artemis, and DefiLlama form the core analytics stack used by institutional and retail traders alike
Key on-chain metrics: active addresses, exchange flows, TVL, NVT ratio, MVRV, whale concentration — used to identify market cycle tops/bottoms and smart money movements
Nansen AI-driven smart money tracking identifies early accumulation/distribution patterns; Dune enables custom SQL dashboards with community-generated analytics
Crypto arbitrage in 2026: typical opportunities range 0.1-2%, CEX dominates price discovery with 61% higher integration than DEX, only 40% of top arb opportunities profitable after costs
Funding rate arbitrage (delta-neutral long spot + short perp) yields 15-50%+ APR; example: Binance SOL-PERP at 0.003%/hr vs Drift at -0.00511%/hr
L2 solutions and cross-chain bridges (Wormhole, LayerZero, Across) have enhanced arbitrage viability by enabling near-instantaneous transfers with lower fees

sections.title: Content Created
items: On-Chain Analytics Guide 2026 — 984-line learn guide covering core metrics, top 5 platforms with comparison table, smart money tracking, signal reading, dashboard building, DeFi analytics, and risks/limitations. Includes 6 FAQs and 6+ internal links.

Crypto Arbitrage Strategies Guide 2026 — 964-line learn guide covering 5 arbitrage types (spatial, triangular, cross-chain, funding rate, statistical), CEX-DEX execution flows, funding rate delta-neutral strategy with real examples, tools/infrastructure, risk management, and getting started guide. Includes 6 FAQs and 6+ internal links.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: On-Chain Analytics guide: title 'On-Chain Analytics Guide 2026 — Crypto Data Tools | degen0x', target keywords: on-chain analytics, blockchain data, Glassnode, Nansen, Dune Analytics, smart money tracking, crypto data tools

Arbitrage guide: title 'Crypto Arbitrage Strategies Guide 2026 — CEX, DEX & More | degen0x', target keywords: crypto arbitrage, CEX DEX arbitrage, funding rate arbitrage, cross-chain arbitrage, delta neutral strategy
Both pages include OpenGraph article metadata with publishedTime, FAQ structured data schemas for featured snippets, internal links to related tools and guides
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts
